response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analysed video, identified two distinct vocal songs: 'GACHA × GACHA ADVENTURE!' (Raora Panthera) and 'RENEGADE' (Hololive English -Justice-). 2. Used search tool to confirm song titles, artists, and lyrics. 3. Mapped the scenes chronologically: skit (00:00-01:26), Raora's singing (01:26-04:33), and shopping segment (04:34 onwards). 4. Compiled data and lyrics into the required JSON format, ensuring end time does not exceed video duration.
response.global_summary: The video features a comedic skit about cucumber theft in a car followed by a dramatic field scene, a performance of 'GACHA × GACHA ADVENTURE!' by Raora Panthera, and a concluding 'Justice Shopping' segment featuring 'RENEGADE'.

scenes.description: The Justice members are in a car, humorously arguing over a horse with a cucumber.
Raora Panthera is singing 'GACHA × GACHA ADVENTURE!' in a field, joined by the other members.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
(Yes! Yes! Yes! Pon! Pon!)
(Yes! Yes! Yes! Pon! Pon!)
(Gacha, gacha, Rao oooo!!)
Come on, come on, let's go on a treasure hunt!
"What kind of prize will I find today, nya?"
Come on, come on, everyone together!
"Fun adventure, let's go!"
Once you get hooked, you can't get out~
Food, plushies, pizza, and pasta,
All stuffed into this mesmerizing maze
The excitement just doesn't stop (Proviamo!)
Almost got it, but couldn't, it's so frustrating!
Crane game "Nya~ come on!"
I won't give up and retire, that's not me!
"Aim for the complete set!"
Come on, one more time, stopping it is useless♪
Repeating déjà vu
Don't tell me to give up (;ω;)
Third time's the charm, so no problem
Overflowing thoughts, can't stop this, is this my calling!?
Filled with fun things
This will continue forever
"Yes, one, two!"
Gacha × Gacha Adventure!
(Gacha... Gacha... Gacha... Gacha...)
"Game, restart!"
Keep spinning it round and round
"No, I can't stop!"
Until I get the prize I'm looking for
"Please, one more time!" (Bim bum bam!)
Once I get on the beat, I can't stop~
Rhyme games are also my specialty
Combo and fever, all of them
If I pull it off, it's perfect groove!
If I miss, it's game over (Andiamo!)
Racing game, engine full throttle, it's so hot
Intense battle! "Go, go, go!"
Once I get ahead at the corner
Aiming for 1st place!
Come on, one more time, but today it's the end
One more time, start to say it and stop
The happy feeling makes my chest tighten
Hey, do I really have to say goodbye?
I don't want to go home yet, is this love!?
Overflowing with excitement
In the days to come, too
"Let's go on an adventure together!"
Come on, one more time, stopping it is useless♪
Repeating déjà vu
Don't tell me to give up (;ω;)
I'll try again and again
So no problem
Overflowing thoughts, can't stop this, this is my calling!!
I can start over as many times as I want
Yes, life is (Everyone together!)
Gacha × Gacha Adventure!
(Yes! Yes! Yes! Pon! Pon!)
(Yes! Yes! Yes! Pon! Pon!)
(Gacha, gacha, Rao oooo!!)
"Let's go on an adventure together again! Ciao ciao♪"

scenes.description: The 'Justice Shopping' segment starts, accompanied by the song 'RENEGADE'.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Tame the fire and fall before my justice
Final warning you know my rage is limitless
On the advent of a new genesis I'm
Infamous, yeah I get a little villainous
Look into my eyes I'll seek you out
Reveal the truth and lies that you just can't hide
Clawing at the walls I feel these sick temptations
What do I have to sacrifice?
Bound by a chain desiring to do it my way
This hurricane of a devastating force is coming
Out of my veins feel my pulse it's rising and igniting
Fire, snuff it out
Walking the line on the edge of becoming what I never thought
I'd be better this than a goner take 'em all out
Renegade uh uh
Walking the line fall so far into poison and I'm seeing me
Anew got ya locked and I'm loaded take 'em all out, renegade
Justice, it's just like that
I don't care at all,
I'll fall deeper till I can't quit
Never gon' stop
Cause I don't have a limit
My moral compass is out of focus
Renegade I'll make it a little wicked
The light goes out
The light goes out
The light goes out
The light goes out
The light goes out
